parameters.name: User-Agent
parameters.value: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36

parameters.content:
## MeshMinds PrintChecker v2 - Dual Webhook

### Setup (required before activating)

1. **Anthropic API key**
   Settings > Variables > add:
   `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY` = `sk-ant-api03-...`

2. **Webhook URLs (after activating)**
   - `https://meshminds.app.n8n.cloud/webhook/idea`  (URL submit)
   - `https://meshminds.app.n8n.cloud/webhook/idea2` (full analysis)

3. **CORS** - both Respond nodes set `Access-Control-Allow-Origin: *`

### Flow

**POST /idea** - fires immediately when user verifies a URL:
  Receives: `{ url }`
  Returns:  `{ url, status: 'received' }` (fire-and-forget)

**POST /idea2** - fires after user completes the questionnaire:
  Receives: `{ url|description, category, marketplace, priceRange,
    printTime, material, extraCosts, experience, activeMarkets,
    socialMedia, sellFrom, sellTo, legalFlags }`
  Pipeline: Scrape URL > Extract context > Build Claude prompt
            > Call Claude sonnet-4-6 > Parse JSON > Respond

### Input handling
- URL input: scrapes MakerWorld/Printables (__NEXT_DATA__ extraction
  with plain-text fallback), then Claude analysis
- Free-text description: skips scrape, Claude analyses description directly
- Scrape failure: continueOnFail + onError keeps pipeline alive, Claude infers from URL

### HTTP body pattern (typeVersion 4.2)
  sendBody: true
  specifyBody: 'json'
  jsonBody: '={{ $json.claudeRequest }}'
